cache: Weights are retained in local_cache so re-use avoids a re-load from disk.

gpu_direct_quantized.description: Load quantized weights directly onto the GPU from disk; runs entirely on GPU.

gpu_partial_offload.description: Hybrid: some layers on GPU, the rest offloaded to CPU. Consumes partial GPU + partial CPU RAM (split is model/layer dependent).

cpu_only.description: Run entirely on CPU (quantized). Uses the cpu_model slot + CPU RAM.
